title: Aurora, 33686, Palm Pals Scales Alligator 5In, Soft Toy, Grey & Green
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Introducing Palm Pals Scales Alligator, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Scales is the smoothest gator in the swamps! It is a grey and green coloured cute and cuddly alligator soft toy, filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Scales Alligator is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Scales Alligator soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Scales Alligator measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable grey and green coloured alligator which has a cute face with a big puffy mouth. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
